changes: Added `stateSlug: string` and `countrySlug: string` fields to V5Context interface
Updated ctx() to accept stateSlug + countrySlug and embed them in V5Context
Added buildH2Label() — maps each of the 24 SectionDef labels to a keyword-bearing H2 string that includes the city name and relevant service terms
Modified sectionWrapper() — signature changed from (body, c, sectionId: number) to (body, c, section: SectionDef); now prepends '##H2::{label}##\n\n' before the section opener+body
Fixed buildV5InternalLinks() — replaced /escorts/{slug}, /{cat}/{slug}, /adult-services/{slug} with correct live routes
Fixed related city anchor text — was '{city} ← {current}', now 'escorts in {city}'
Fixed category links — now use /category/{slug} route (e.g. /category/escorts, /category/massage)
Fixed architecture anchor links — now point to /{country}/{state}/{city} canonical URL
Updated buildV5CityContent() signature to accept stateSlug (default '') and countrySlug (default 'in')
Updated generateV5CitySEO() to pass stateSlug to buildV5CityContent()
Updated call site: sectionWrapper(core, c, s) instead of sectionWrapper(core, c, s.id)

Added parseIntroSections() — splits introContent on '\n\n' and extracts ##H2:: sentinels into structured sections with h2 and body fields; backward-compatible (pages without sentinels render as flat paragraphs)

Added SeoIntroContent component — if any sections have an h2, renders

+

pairs; otherwise falls back to the legacy flat paragraph renderer
Replaced inline intro rendering block with <SeoIntroContent intro={intro} />

requirements.detail: SeoIntroContent component parses ##H2:: sentinels and renders <h2 class='text-base sm:text-lg font-semibold text-foreground'> for each section

requirements.req: Replace generic section labels with keyword-bearing H2 labels
requirements.detail: buildH2Label() maps all 24 SECTION_POOL labels to keyword-rich headings that include city name + service terms (e.g. 'Escorts for Business Travellers in Bandra, Mumbai')

requirements.req: Fix internal link URL generation to use live route builders
requirements.detail: Architecture anchors now use /{country}/{state}/{city}; category links use /category/{slug}; neighbourhood links use city canonical URL. Removed all broken /escorts/{slug}, /{cat}/{slug}, /adult-services/{slug} patterns

requirements.req: Fix related city anchor text to 'Escorts in {city}'
requirements.detail: Was: '{city} ← {current city}'. Now: 'escorts in {city}'. Verified for Mumbai → Pune, Nagpur, Thane

requirements.req: Fix category link generation to use live route builders
requirements.detail: Now uses /category/escorts, /category/massage, /category/dating, /category/adult-jobs with anchor text '{category} in {city}'

notImplemented: SeoKeyword table / DB schema additions — deferred to Phase 2
SEO cron / automated regeneration — deferred to Phase 2
Keyword density tracking — deferred to Phase 2

backwardCompatibility.legacyPages:
parseIntroSections() returns h2=null sections for pages without ##H2:: markers; SeoIntroContent falls back to the original flat

renderer — zero visual change for existing content
